name: Destromon

signature_move.name: San Renshōhō
signature_move.description: Fires the turrets on its arms.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A Perfect Digimon that took in the data of the most powerful battleship in the world. It boasts a size capable of transporting combat Digimon and the like, and once it reaches a strike point, it will join the battle with its overwhelming destructive power. Its armaments include the " San Renshōhō " on its arms, the " Juggernaut Blast ", which is fired from its chest, and the " Long-Range Buster Cannon " on its back, all of which have high firepower, so not even dust will be left behind when attacked by Destromon.
